name: vayu
description: Vayu global voice dictation overlay utilizing local Whisperflow

scripts.package-mac: clang -O3 helper.cpp -framework CoreGraphics -framework CoreFoundation -lstdc++ -o helper && electron-packager . Vayu --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --overwrite --extend-info=extend.plist --icon=assets/vayu.icns --app-bundle-id=com.vayu.dictation && rm -rf /Applications/Vayu.app && cp -R Vayu-darwin-arm64/Vayu.app /Applications/Vayu.app && cp helper /Applications/Vayu.app/Contents/MacOS/helper && chmod +x /Applications/Vayu.app/Contents/MacOS/helper && codesign --force --deep --sign - /Applications/Vayu.app
